title: DevSwarm / LLM Economics
description: The open-model cost thesis, live: tokens per role, per model, and fallback-promotion pressure. If the swarm gets expensive or a provider degrades, this page says so first.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'] + attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name LIKE 'llm.%' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS ts, attributes_string['devswarm.role'] AS role, sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'] + attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name LIKE 'llm.%' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts, role ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT attributes_string['gen_ai.request.model'] AS model, count() AS calls, sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'] + attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) AS tokens, round(avg(durationNano)/1e9,1) AS avg_s FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name LIKE 'llm.%' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY model ORDER BY tokens DESC

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS ts, attributes_string['devswarm.role'] AS role, count() AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND arrayExists(e -> e LIKE '%fallback_promotion%', events) AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts, role ORDER BY ts
